name: get_course_details
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Udemy course by its ID. Returns the full description, instructor details, ratings breakdown, enrollment count, pricing, and last update date. Useful for presenting comprehensive course information before a user decides to enroll.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the course.

parameters.name: fields[course]
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

body.title: Python for Data Science and Machine Learning Bootcamp
body.headline: Learn how to use NumPy, Pandas, Seaborn, Matplotlib, Plotly, Scikit-Learn, Machine Learning, and more!
body.description: This course covers everything from basic Python to advanced machine learning algorithms...
